prompt:
A pair of compact wheel encoders for small robots resting on a wooden workbench: each encoder consists of a plastic housing with a slotted disk and a small sensor module mounted beside it. The two encoders are placed face-to-face, and in the background a small robot chassis with wheels is slightly out of focus, with one encoder visible mounted near a wheel hub. Thin signal wires extend from each encoder, ready to be plugged into a controller.

Near-future solarpunk robotics lab aesthetic with warm lighting, tidy tools on a pegboard, and a plant or solar panel visible in the background. Photorealistic 512×512 rendering, no brand logos or legible text. The composition should clearly show that this is a pair of low-resolution wheel encoders used for tracking rotation on a robot.
